channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Dow tumbles almost 800 points and enters correction, S&P 500 posts fifth straight losing week: Live updates - CNBC

item.title: Judge dismisses lawsuit by Musk's X Corp accusing advertisers of illegal boycott - Reuters
item.description:
1. Judge dismisses lawsuit by Musk's X Corp accusing advertisers of illegal boycott  Reuters
  2. Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge  BBC
  3. Court Dismisses X Lawsuit Alleging Brands Illegally Boycotted the Platform  wsj.com
  4. Judge dismisses X lawsuit accusing advertisers of illegal boycott  The Hill
  5. Court tosses out X's suit that accused major advertisers of illegally boycotting the Elon Musk-owned platform  Business Insider

item.title: Iran war: Is another 1970s‑style oil crisis looming? - DW.com
item.description:
1. Iran war: Is another 1970s‑style oil crisis looming?  DW.com
  2. Opinion | How to Straighten Out the Hormuz Bottleneck  The New York Times
  3. Southeast Asia is being hit hard by Iran’s cutoff of oil and gas  npr.org
  4. Energy Lessons of the Strait of Hormuz Standoff  City Journal
  5. Everyday life in Asia is being upended by Iran war fuel crisis  BBC

item.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq Futures Drop As Trump Pushes Iran Deal Deadline—Unity Software, Oracle, SoFi Technologies In Focus - State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (ARCA:SPY) - Benzinga
item.description:
1. Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq Futures Drop As Trump Pushes Iran Deal Deadline—Unity Software, Oracle, SoFi Technologies In Focus - State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (ARCA:SPY)  Benzinga
  2. Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq slide as Iran war pushes oil prices higher  Yahoo Finance
  3. Asia markets trade mixed as murky U.S.-Iran peace deal prospects keep investors on edge  CNBC
  4. Stocks fall and oil prices rise as fears persist over Middle East war  Reuters
  5. Investors Question Whether Quick Peace in Iran Is Possible  The New York Times
